context: Slot A overnight (2026-05-19 04:00 UTC) completed post-hoc PhD audit on AP Biology M1-M9 — those modules were originally produced WITHOUT the 3-reviewer cascade and needed regression cover. Audit results: 4 pass / 5 minor / 0 critical, all flagged issues stylistic or scope-related, no factual errors. That unblocked AP Bio M10+ for fresh generation. Slot B picked up batch 3 of slot A's plan (M10-M11) using the FULL 3-reviewer cascade this time.

produced_detail.title: Module 10: Natural Selection and Evolution
topics_covered: Darwin's 4 postulates (variation, heritable, Malthusian, differential reproductive success)
Evidence for evolution (fossil record, biogeography incl. placental vs marsupial wolf, homologous/analogous/vestigial, embryology, molecular, direct observation)
Types of selection on continuous traits (directional/stabilizing/disruptive/sexual, with intersexual vs intrasexual)
Hardy-Weinberg equilibrium (5 conditions mapped 1:1 to 5 mechanisms; p+q=1, p²+2pq+q²=1)
Mechanisms of evolution (mutation, gene flow, drift incl. bottleneck/founder, selection, non-random mating)
Fitness as relative reproductive success (not strength/longevity), context-dependent
ap_traps_explicitly_inoculated: H-W is a null model, not a real-world fact
non-random mating shifts genotype but not allele frequency
natural selection acts on phenotypes, not directly on genotypes
Lamarckism pre-empted: mutations exist before selection acts
evolution has no goal or progress ladder
drift is non-adaptive — survivors are lucky, not better

produced_detail.title: Module 11: Speciation and Phylogeny
topics_covered: Species concepts (biological/Mayr, morphological, ecological, phylogenetic; with HGT caveat for prokaryotes)
Modes of speciation (allopatric, sympatric incl. polyploidy/habitat differentiation/sexual selection, parapatric)
Pace of speciation (gradualism vs Eldredge & Gould punctuated equilibrium — explicitly NOT saltation)
Phylogenetic trees (monophyletic/paraphyletic/polyphyletic; synapomorphy/plesiomorphy as RELATIVE to clade)
Mass extinctions (Big Five, Permian ~96% marine, K-Pg ~66 Mya non-avian dinosaurs)
Origin of life (Miller-Urey 1953 with atmosphere caveat, RNA world, LUCA ~3.5 Bya, endosymbiotic theory: Margulis, 4 evidences)
ap_traps_explicitly_inoculated: punctuated equilibrium is NOT saltation — bursts are still population-level gradual
tips on a phylogeny are not 'more evolved' — all extant tips are at the present
humans did not descend from chimpanzees — chimps are cousins, not ancestors
BSC limits: doesn't apply to asexual organisms, fossils, or many bacteria (with HGT note)
synapomorphy/plesiomorphy are relative to which clade you're examining
Miller-Urey atmosphere assumption is now considered too reducing — result still stands

round_2.C: minor (textbook elaborations only; all round-1 critical specifics dropped)

produced_detail.post_writer_fix: Writer placed '2n = 64' / '2n = 62' chromosome counts as visual labels on slide 02_hook despite the cascade dropping those numbers. Slot B noticed and edited build_slides.py to replace with 'domestic horse' / 'domestic donkey' labels, then regenerated slides. Citation discipline now matches cascade verdict.

verification.artifact_contract: ALL required files present in both folders: _outline.json, _review_A.json, _review_B.json, _review_C.json, _review_A_v2.json, _review_B_v2.json, _review_C_v2.json, script.json, build_slides.py, slides/*.png, intro_music.wav, outro_music.wav
verification.banned_terms_check: clean — no Cognia, US-accredited, UCSB, NJIT, (SIT), or 美国认证 references in either script.json or build_slides.py

throughput: 2 modules through full 2-round 3-reviewer cascade + writer + slide build. Parallel sub-agents at peak: 6 (round-1 reviewers) and 6 (round-2 reviewers). Tradeoff vs slot A's M6-M9 4-module run: half the throughput but with the cascade fully restored after the May 2026 regression.
anomalies: Writer for M11 introduced 2n=64/62 chromosome counts as visual slide labels on 02_hook even though the cascade explicitly dropped those numbers. Slot B caught it during verification and patched build_slides.py + rebuilt slides. Lesson for future writer prompts: explicitly tell the writer that cascade drops apply to VISUAL labels too, not just spoken narration.

Slot A's 2026-05-18 task description in the scheduled-task file says 'AP Biology 3/9 ⚠️ generated without review cascade' — that count was stale by the time slot B ran today; all 9 of M1-M9 existed and slot A had just completed post-hoc PhD audits on them overnight.
